message:
🐛 Fix Add Cards modal footer visibility and close behavior (#107)

- Move browse tab footer outside BaseModal.Content so it's always visible
- Add try-catch around onAddCards to ensure modal closes even on error
- Footer with "Select All" and "Add Cards" buttons now stays fixed at bottom

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
